title: agrostis stolonifera var. verticillata
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. verticillata, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin irritations, wounds, and inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Agrostis stolonifera var. verticillata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
